remarks: Nestled in one of Westport's most sought-after in-town neighborhoods, 7 Lincoln Street offers a rare opportunity to own a home that has been lovingly maintained and quietly cherished for more than five decades. Just moments from the Saugatuck River, vibrant Main Street, Saugatuck Village, train to NYC, Compo Beach. Easy access to local schools without a car or bus. This property delivers a lifestyle defined by convenience, connectivity, & coastal charm. The home showcases enduring pride of ownership, w/beautiful landscaping that creates a sense of calm and welcome from the moment you arrive. Inside with natural light filled windows, wood floors, exposed brick, stainless appliances. A finished loft 3rd floor with large skylights opening to fresh air and view of the sparkling river. One car garage, driveway with space for two cars. Inviting natural wood front porch and a fenced in yard with private spaces for entertaining and relaxing under a gazebo for casual living. A versatile floor plan supports today's living needs as a single family home with the opportunity of a top two-floor legal accessory apartment - perfect for extended living, guests, or income-producing potential. Whether you envision moving right in, updating to make it your own, creating something entirely new, or just investing, the possibilities here are undeniable. Opportunities like this - a valuable combination of charm, ideal location, well cared for, with multiple use potential- rarely come to market.
